sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49716" key="i(ara/rxas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱαράρχας</orth> and other words beginning with <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱαρ-</foreign> <sense id="n49716.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱερ-</ref></xr>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἱερ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
